assertions.text: The response produces a self-contained HTML report at .simonk/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM.html.
The report includes an executive summary, decisions log, phase trace, diff summary, and verification.
The response reports what simonK or the session accomplished, equivalent to /simonk-report.
It captures the decisions log and phase trace for the work performed.
The response generates a session report led by an executive summary.
It outputs a rich self-contained HTML report saved under .simonk/reports/.
The response recognizes this generic HTML request should route to html-default-output, not simonk-report.
It does not produce a .simonk/reports session report for this request.
